# ElysiaJS

> Ergonomic Framework for Humans. TypeScript with End-to-End Type Safety, unified type system, and outstanding developer experience. Supercharged by Bun.

Elysia is built on Bun and uses TypeBox for schema validation. Install with `bun add elysia`. Start a server with `new Elysia().get('/path', handler).listen(3000)`.

## Getting Started

- [Quick Start](https://elysiajs.com/quick-start.md): Get started with Elysia in minutes — install, create routes, run
- [Key Concept](https://elysiajs.com/key-concept.md): Core concepts: unified type system, MVC patterns, performance approach
- [Tutorial](https://elysiajs.com/tutorial): Interactive step-by-step tutorial for building a note-taking API
- [At a Glance](https://elysiajs.com/at-glance.md): Feature overview — type inference, 21x faster than Express, full-stack support

## Essential

- [Route](https://elysiajs.com/essential/route.md): Define routes with `.get()`, `.post()`, `.put()`, `.patch()`, `.delete()`, `.all()`, `.route()`. Path parameters (`:id`), wildcard (`*`), and optional params
- [Handler](https://elysiajs.com/essential/handler.md): Context object with `body`, `query`, `params`, `headers`, `cookie`, `set`, `request`, `store`. Return values as responses
- [Validation](https://elysiajs.com/essential/validation.md): TypeBox schema validation on `body`, `query`, `params`, `headers`, `cookie`, `response`. `t.Object()`, `t.String()`, `t.Number()`, `t.Array()`, `t.Optional()`, `t.Nullable()`
- [Lifecycle](https://elysiajs.com/essential/life-cycle.md): Request lifecycle hooks — `onRequest`, `onParse`, `onTransform`, `beforeHandle`, `afterHandle`, `onError`, `onResponse`, `onStop`. Local vs global scope
- [Plugin](https://elysiajs.com/essential/plugin.md): Extend Elysia with plugins using `.use()`. Scoped vs global plugins. Plugin deduplication
- [Best Practice](https://elysiajs.com/essential/best-practice.md): Service layer pattern, controller pattern, organizing large applications, avoiding state mutation

## Patterns

- [Configuration](https://elysiajs.com/patterns/configuration.md): Elysia constructor options — `prefix`, `name`, `seed`, `serve`, `websocket`, `cookie`, `normalize`
- [Cookie](https://elysiajs.com/patterns/cookie.md): Type-safe cookie handling with `cookie` context, `cookie.set()`, signed cookies, cookie options
- [WebSocket](https://elysiajs.com/patterns/websocket.md): Real-time bidirectional communication with `.ws()`, `open`, `message`, `close`, `drain` handlers
- [Server Sent Events](https://elysiajs.com/patterns/server-sent-events.md): Push data to clients using `context.request` and SSE streams, or the official SSE plugin
- [Error Handling](https://elysiajs.com/patterns/error-handling.md): Handle errors with `onError` lifecycle, `error()` utility, custom error classes
- [OpenAPI](https://elysiajs.com/patterns/openapi.md): Auto-generate OpenAPI documentation with `.detail()`, Swagger UI, schema tags
- [Macro](https://elysiajs.com/patterns/macro.md): Create reusable lifecycle logic with `.macro()` — authentication guards, rate limiting, etc.
- [Extends Context](https://elysiajs.com/patterns/extends-context.md): Add custom properties to context with `.state()`, `.decorate()`, `.derive()`
- [TypeBox](https://elysiajs.com/patterns/typebox.md): Using TypeBox schema types — `t.Object`, `t.Transform`, `t.TemplateLiteral`, custom validators
- [Mount](https://elysiajs.com/patterns/mount.md): Mount WHATWG-compatible frameworks (`fetch(Request): Response`) with `.mount()`
- [Unit Test](https://elysiajs.com/patterns/unit-test.md): Test Elysia apps using `app.handle(new Request(...))` without starting a server
- [Trace](https://elysiajs.com/patterns/trace.md): Performance profiling and debugging with `.trace()` API
- [OpenTelemetry](https://elysiajs.com/patterns/opentelemetry.md): Distributed tracing with OpenTelemetry integration via `@elysiajs/opentelemetry`
- [TypeScript](https://elysiajs.com/patterns/typescript.md): TypeScript strict mode setup and tsconfig recommendations for Elysia
- [Fullstack Dev Server](https://elysiajs.com/patterns/fullstack-dev-server.md): Serve frontend assets alongside API using Bun's static file serving
- [Deploy](https://elysiajs.com/patterns/deploy.md): Deploy to Bun, Docker, Vercel, Railway, Fly.io, and more

## Eden (End-to-End Type Safety)

- [Overview](https://elysiajs.com/eden/overview.md): Introduction to Eden — zero-overhead end-to-end type safety between server and client
- [Installation](https://elysiajs.com/eden/installation.md): `bun add @elysiajs/eden` — setup and configuration
- [Eden Treaty](https://elysiajs.com/eden/treaty/overview.md): Reactive type-safe HTTP client — `eden.path.method({...})` RPC-style calls
- [Treaty Parameters](https://elysiajs.com/eden/treaty/parameters.md): How to pass query, body, headers, and path parameters to Treaty calls
- [Treaty Response](https://elysiajs.com/eden/treaty/response.md): Handling responses, errors, and data types from Treaty calls
- [Treaty WebSocket](https://elysiajs.com/eden/treaty/websocket.md): Type-safe WebSocket client with Eden Treaty
- [Treaty Config](https://elysiajs.com/eden/treaty/config.md): Configure base URL, fetch options, and interceptors
- [Treaty Unit Test](https://elysiajs.com/eden/treaty/unit-test.md): Test Elysia endpoints with Eden Treaty in unit tests
- [Eden Fetch](https://elysiajs.com/eden/fetch.md): Fetch-compatible type-safe client for non-RPC use cases

## Plugins

- [Overview](https://elysiajs.com/plugins/overview.md): Official and community plugin listing with install instructions
- [Bearer](https://elysiajs.com/plugins/bearer.md): Extract Bearer token from `Authorization` header — `bearer` in context
- [CORS](https://elysiajs.com/plugins/cors.md): Cross-Origin Resource Sharing — `origin`, `methods`, `allowedHeaders`, `credentials` options
- [Cron](https://elysiajs.com/plugins/cron.md): Schedule recurring tasks with cron syntax using `@elysiajs/cron`
- [GraphQL Apollo](https://elysiajs.com/plugins/graphql-apollo.md): Apollo GraphQL server as Elysia plugin
- [GraphQL Yoga](https://elysiajs.com/plugins/graphql-yoga.md): GraphQL Yoga server as Elysia plugin
- [HTML](https://elysiajs.com/plugins/html.md): Serve JSX/HTML with proper `Content-Type` using `@elysiajs/html`
- [JWT](https://elysiajs.com/plugins/jwt.md): JSON Web Token sign/verify — `jwt.sign()`, `jwt.verify()` in context
- [OpenAPI](https://elysiajs.com/plugins/openapi.md): Scalar/Swagger UI documentation with `@elysiajs/openapi`
- [OpenTelemetry](https://elysiajs.com/plugins/opentelemetry.md): Distributed tracing with `@elysiajs/opentelemetry`
- [Server Timing](https://elysiajs.com/plugins/server-timing.md): Add Server-Timing header for performance measurement with `@elysiajs/server-timing`
- [Static](https://elysiajs.com/plugins/static.md): Serve static files from a directory with `@elysiajs/static`
- [Swagger](https://elysiajs.com/plugins/swagger.md): Swagger UI documentation with `@elysiajs/swagger` (legacy, prefer openapi plugin)

## Integrations

- [Astro](https://elysiajs.com/integrations/astro.md): Use Elysia in Astro API endpoints with `APIRoute` pattern
- [Cloudflare Worker](https://elysiajs.com/integrations/cloudflare-worker.md): Deploy Elysia on Cloudflare Workers
- [Deno](https://elysiajs.com/integrations/deno.md): Use Elysia on Deno runtime
- [Expo](https://elysiajs.com/integrations/expo.md): Use Elysia in Expo API routes
- [Netlify](https://elysiajs.com/integrations/netlify.md): Deploy Elysia on Netlify Functions
- [Next.js](https://elysiajs.com/integrations/nextjs.md): Use Elysia in Next.js Route Handler via `handle` method
- [Node.js](https://elysiajs.com/integrations/node.md): Run Elysia on Node.js with `@elysiajs/node` adapter
- [Nuxt](https://elysiajs.com/integrations/nuxt.md): Use Elysia in Nuxt Server routes
- [SvelteKit](https://elysiajs.com/integrations/sveltekit.md): Use Elysia in SvelteKit server endpoints
- [TanStack Start](https://elysiajs.com/integrations/tanstack-start.md): Use Elysia with TanStack Start
- [Vercel](https://elysiajs.com/integrations/vercel.md): Deploy Elysia on Vercel Edge Functions
- [AI SDK](https://elysiajs.com/integrations/ai-sdk.md): Integrate Vercel AI SDK — streaming responses, chat completions
- [Better Auth](https://elysiajs.com/integrations/better-auth.md): Authentication with Better Auth integration
- [Drizzle](https://elysiajs.com/integrations/drizzle.md): Type-safe database queries with Drizzle ORM utility types
- [Prisma](https://elysiajs.com/integrations/prisma.md): Database access with Prisma ORM
- [React Email](https://elysiajs.com/integrations/react-email.md): Create and send email templates using JSX

## Migration Guides

- [From Express](https://elysiajs.com/migrate/from-express.md): Migrating from Express to Elysia — middleware, routing, error handling differences
- [From Fastify](https://elysiajs.com/migrate/from-fastify.md): Migrating from Fastify to Elysia — schema validation, plugins, lifecycle
- [From Hono](https://elysiajs.com/migrate/from-hono.md): Migrating from Hono to Elysia — context, middleware, routing
- [From tRPC](https://elysiajs.com/migrate/from-trpc.md): Migrating from tRPC to Elysia — replacing routers with Eden Treaty

## Optional

- [llms-full.txt](https://elysiajs.com/llms-full.txt): Full Elysia documentation in a single file for LLM consumption
- [Blog](https://elysiajs.com/blog.md): Elysia blog posts, release notes, and performance benchmarks
- [Discord](https://discord.gg/eaFJ2KDJck): Official ElysiaJS Discord community server
- [Twitter/X](https://twitter.com/elysiajs): Updates and announcements
- [GitHub](https://github.com/elysiajs/elysia): Elysia source code and issue tracker
